title: senecio grandiflorus
intro: Senecio grandiflorus, also known as Butterfly Bush or Great Butterburs, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as coughs and colds due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Senecio grandiflorus include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
